Access/correction requests (APP 12/13) may be submitted via our DSAR form (portal.southportmeridian.au/dsar) or by email to privacy@southportmeridian.au; we aim to respond within 30 days
we do not require Tax File Numbers and request they not be provided
draft, unlodged ASX Appendix 4D and Appendix 3B materials
must not brief analysts or investors on that content
in a trading blackout until lodgement and two full ASX trading days thereafter
where a customer supplies a TFN or driver licence in free text, we redact and securely delete it

must_detect.matched_text:
security@southportmeridian.au.
For ASX/ASIC compliance, we generally communicate using information already available in lodged ASX announcements, annual/half-year reports, and broad press releases, and we avoid selective disclosure.
Employees with access to draft, unlodged ASX Appendix 4D and Appendix 3B materials are in a trading blackout until lodgement and two full ASX trading days thereafter, and must not brief analysts or investors on that content.
References to “results”, “capital raising”, “Appendix 4E”, “Appendix 3Y” and similar terms in this notice are generic and do not include numbers or non-public detail.
Public/stale information example: our registered office moved to Level 8, 12 Example Parade, Docklands VIC 3000, as disclosed in an ASX announcement dated 03/02/2024; this address is not confidential.
Transaction records are logged for service quality (e.g., time stamps, device type) and de-identified for analytics; training screenshots use placeholders like ACCT-0000
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

must_detect.matched_text:
Southport Meridian Pty Ltd (ABN 11 111 111 111, example only) — AU Privacy, Retention and Market Conduct Notice
We handle personal information as defined in the Privacy Act 1988 (Cth) (information or opinion about an identified or reasonably identifiable individual) under the Australian Privacy Principles.
Categories collected include employment records (HR files, roster history), health information for fitness-for-work clearances, and credit information for trade credit applications; we do not require Tax File Numbers and request they not be provided.
Access/correction requests (APP 12/13) may be submitted via our DSAR form (portal.southportmeridian.au/dsar) or by email to privacy@southportmeridian.au; we aim to respond within 30 days.
Retention: HR records 7 years after employment ends; pre-employment health screening reports 2 years after decision; credit application data 5 years after account closure; de-identified analytics retained indefinitely.
Storage is primarily in AU regions with backups in a contracted Singapore facility under APP 8 with standard contractual safeguards; we do not sell personal information.
We assess and notify under the Notifiable Data Breaches scheme and may contact the OAIC if required; our incident mailbox is security@southportmeridian.au.
For ASX/ASIC compliance, we generally communicate using information already available in lodged ASX announcements, annual/half-year reports, and broad press releases, and we avoid selective disclosure.
Employees with access to draft, unlodged ASX Appendix 4D and Appendix 3B materials are in a trading blackout until lodgement and two full ASX trading days thereafter, and must not brief analysts or investors on that content.
References to “results”, “capital raising”, “Appendix 4E”, “Appendix 3Y” and similar terms in this notice are generic and do not include numbers or non-public detail.
Public/stale information example: our registered office moved to Level 8, 12 Example Parade, Docklands VIC 3000, as disclosed in an ASX announcement dated 03/02/2024; this address is not confidential.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
